products.name: Topre Realforce R3S
products.description:
Space saving TKL form factor
Non-detachable cable with USB-A computer connection
Laser printed PBT keycaps
Full N-key rollover
Genuine Topre capacitive switches
Change switch actuation point between 4 levels: 0.8mm, 1.5mm, 2.2mm, and 3.0mm

products.name: Chilkey ND104 CNC
products.description:
CNC machined 6063 aluminum case with ball catch design and magnetic connectors
Connect 3 ways- wired with USB-C cable or wirelessly with Bluetooth 5.4 and 2.4 GHz
Connect up to 3 devices wirelessly
Flex cut FR4 gold-immersion plate with plate mount stabilizers
Built-in screen with three modes: calculator, clock, and dynamic backgrounds
Hotswap knob controls volume, media, and the screen
Module above numpad can be reconfigured to be screen plus knob, 2 keys plus knob, or 3 keys (keycaps for these not included)
Navigation cluster above the arrows can be removed and replaced with a storage tray perfect for USB drives, wireless receivers, spare switches, or keycaps
Five layers of precision sound dampening—including plate foam, switch foam, PET acoustic pads, and case foam
PCB supports both ANSI and ISO layout (additional ISO plate needed for ISO layout)
Programmable with VIA or Chilkey web driver
Hidden storage slot for 2.4 Ghz receiver on underside
2* 4000mAh batteries
Glare-free RGB backlighting with underglow lighting
NKRO
1000 Hz polling rate in wired and 2.4 GHz mode
104 key full size layout with F13 key and numpad control key (total 106 keys)
MK exclusive Classic Black colorway now available!

products.name: HHKB Hybrid Topre Silent
products.description:
Firmware Update Tool
Download HHKB Firmware Tool
High-Quality Frame And Keys
Keys and keyboard frame are made of top quality PBT texturized to stay dry and resist shine.
Permanent sublimation dye symbols won't fade.

Topre Capacitive Switches
High-quality switches feature silk smooth key press, with a lifespan of up to 50 million presses.

Compact Size & Ergonomic Design
The appealing minimalist style is just the beginning! With a 60 key layout for easier handling, space
saving, and mobility, and contoured frame and key settings.

Intelligent Key Layout
Designed by programmers for programmers to improve speed, accuracy and reduce hand and
finger fatigue -hand never need to leave the home row.

Customizable
The HHKB Hybrid Type-S comes with full key map customization software as well as 6 DIP
switches to customize user experience. Includes 3 adjustable keyboard heights for optimum comfort.

Extensive Utility
Compatible with both PC and Mac, the 60-key HHKB Pro was designed by UNIX professionals and advanced programmers with high-speed typing efficiency in mind. The keyboard is customizable and can be easily modified, meaning it fits the purpose of any user

products.name: Strawberry Frog One 3 Mini
products.description:
Ducky x MK designed Limited Edition Strawberry Frog One 3 Mini
    Beautiful Strawberry Frog artwork exclusive to the first production round only!
    Incredible XDA profile PBT keycaps with Dye Sub print
    Strawberry Frog themed keypuller and braided USB-C cable
    Dual layer hotswap PCB w/ Kailh yellow hotswap sockets
    QUACK Mechanics with dual-layer high-grade silicone and EVA foam sound dampeners
    Improved PCB design, V2 stabilizers, remapped macro layout, and per-key programmable RGB

MK and Ducky have teamed up to bring you another epic Limited Edition theme: Strawberry Frog! Every detail has been considered and diligently worked through in the design and production of this beautiful blend of art and technology. Beyond the amazing tech built into all One 3 Minis, we used XDA profile keycaps to soften the edges and match our hoppity friend. Perfecting the case and keycap prints took months of work and retooling, and the results speak for themselves. Don't miss out on this limited-edition masterpiece!

products.name: Evoworks Evo80
products.description:
CNC aluminum case with ball catch design and magnetic connectors
    Butterfly leaf spring mechanism with specially designed gasket
    Connect 3 ways- wired with USB-C cable or wirelessly with Bluetooth and 2.4 GHz
    Programmable with VIA
    Hotswap PCB with per-key RGB and Polypropylene or FR4 plate
    1000Hz polling rate in wired and 2.4GHz mode
    2* 4000mAh batteries
    Five layers of poron foams with a double-layer of cotton bottom foam for enhanced acoustics
    Dye Sub PBT keycaps
    TKL form factor with F13 key

Each assembled Evo80 keyboard includes:
- CNC aluminum case
- Hotswap PCB
- daughterboard and magnetic connector
- switch plate
- Switches with spares
- 1* set of keycaps in color to match the case
- 1* acoustic package (PET sheet, IXPE sheet, plate foam, 2* Poron case foam)
- stabilizers
- 6* butterfly leaf springs
- gaskets with spares
- 4* silicone corner protectors
- 4* rubber feet
- 2* 4000mAh batteries
- carrying case
- USB-C cable
- 2.4gHz dongle
- Mac add-on kit
- spare screws
- spare leaf spring dampeners
- spare case silicone dampeners

products.name: Vortex Multix
products.description:
Connect 3 ways- wired with USB-C cable or wirelessly with Bluetooth and wireless 2.4 GHz
    Spray-coated ABS case with stack mounted design and o-ring structured support
    Programmable with VIA Version 3.0
    Silicone sound dampening pad under the plate and PCB
    1.6mm PCB supports 6.25U or 7U Spacebar, stepped or standard Caps Lock, and split or standard Backspace
    Hotswap sockets that support both 3-pin or 5-pin switches
    NKRO supported
    Cherry profile Double Shot PBT keycaps
    Two-stage adjustable feet for three different typing angles: 6°, 7° or 11°
    Wireless mode powered by 2* AAA batteries

PCB supports multiple layout options:
- 6.25u or 7u spacebar
- stepped or standard Caps Lock
- split or standard Backspace
- ISO layout
- Tsangan layout

*May not include appropriate keycaps for all layout options.

Includes:
- user manual
- USB-C cable
- additional keycaps
- keycap puller
- switch puller

products.name: Qwertykeys QK65 Mk3 CNC
products.description:
Screen Theme Animations
Dynamic Island- This function primarily displays keyboard status information, supports turning on/off and resizing, but more importantly, it emphasizes DIY customization. It supports uploading multiple GIFs as foreground and background layers. You can use hotkeys to switch between foreground and background, creating your desired combinations. Both GIFs will adjust their playback speed based on your typing rhythm. You can also choose to upload only a background GIF for pure GIF display.
Cat and Dog Theme- The on-screen cat now mirrors your keystrokes in real-time—when you press a key, the cat taps the same one (with special reactions for modifier keys!). The faster you type, the more frantically the hamster at the top runs, eventually flopping down when tired, creating a highly engaging and playful experience.
Animal Supermarket- We've included an engaging typing challenge mini-game: when the "3-2-1" countdown ends, you’ll step into the role of a supermarket cashier, warmly welcoming animal customers as they come to supermarket. You need to type the correct words to help them buy items from the shopkeeper. But don’t get careless—if you make a typo, the shopkeeper will "lovingly" give you a playful slap!
3 Dot-Matrix Displays- The Dot-Matrix Display continues the 3 themes previously featured on the QK101 and QK80 Mk2.

20.7mm front height with 5.3° typing angle
All US import tariffs are prepaid by

products.name: Ducky Yellow One 3 SF
products.description:
The One 3 series features Ducky's all new QUACK Mechanics design philosophy which focuses on achieving best-in-class aesthetics, hotswap functionality, sound dampening, stabilizers, and more! The case for the One 3 maintains a low profile while allowing for a variety of color combinations with its unique 3-layer design. Enjoy the best acoustics you'll find in a prebuilt thanks to the One 3's silicone plate dampener and EVA foam case dampener.

The Yellow Ducky One 3 SF is hot-swappable with Ducky's exclusive top-of-the-line Kailh Yellow Sockets. Ducky's V2 stabilizers provide improved stability, feel, and sound. Thick Double Shot PBT keycaps with seamless legends, 3-level adjustable feet, an improved PCB design, detachable braided USB-C cable, and an improved macro layout are just a few of the features that makes the One 3 rise above the rest.

products.name: CORNE V4
products.description:
Keyboard Version Details

Please clearly understand the differences between coin batteries and rechargeable versions before purchasing,(Hollow-out and Filled version only bottom case difference)

A-COIN battery hollow-out/Filled version: battery not included should prepare extra, because the Coin batteries are usually not accepted by express packages

B-Polymer chargeable version:Each of the left and right parts contains a 160mha rechargeable polymer battery（work more than 4 months after fully charged)

products.name: Moonlander Mark 1
products.description:
Two Halves

Place each half exactly where you need it. Typing at shoulder width keeps your chest open, which leads to a more relaxed posture.

No more hunching over the keyboard.
